summary: End-to-end testing for HydroTent: 17/17 backend pytest tests pass (100%), all 4 frontend tabs + notification bell verified via Playwright. AI chat (Claude) works correctly via emergentintegrations + EMERGENT_LLM_KEY. Plant add, harvest->community feed, notification check, tent status update, tutorials CRUD all functional.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py defines /api/tutorials/upload and video streaming but no frontend button for video upload was tested beyond its presence; storage init is best-effort (OK).

check_notifications inserts a duplicate low_water/low_nutrients notification every call because there is no existing-check (unlike harvest_ready/harvest_soon). Consider adding dedup logic similar to harvest notifications to avoid spam.
Harvest endpoint always writes notes as empty in community_feed (even though /community/harvest supports notes). Minor inconsistency.
server.py (462 lines) is within the 700-line limit. Pydantic models + env usage correct. MongoDB _id is properly excluded everywhere.
seed_data_creation: Tests created TEST_-prefixed plants/tutorials; cleaned up TEST_ plants via DELETE after run. Community feed retains one 'TEST_HarvestBasil harvested!' entry (expected per harvest endpoint design - no delete API for feed).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers all endpoints with Create->GET verification. AI chat test exercises the Claude model path end-to-end (takes ~10s). Low-water/low-nutrients notification check dedup is a known minor bug - notifications get re-inserted on repeated POST /api/notifications/check calls.
